title: Selixes - Self-hosted LLM failover gateway, budget caps and PII
abstract: We built Selixes, a self-hosted LLM failover gateway with atomic budget caps and PII redaction. Repo: https://github.com/selixes/gateway
abstract_zh: 我们打造了 Selixes——一个自带备份计划的自托管大模型网关，还能帮你精打细算预算和一键脱敏隐私数据。就像给自己家的网络加了个“保险丝”一样，Selixes 让你既能享受大模型服务，又能省心省钱保护隐私！GitHub 地址：https://github.com/selixes/gateway
